name: @jantra/runtime
description: Jantra AI runtime and planning pipeline on Gemini 2.5, with guardrails, audit, and human gates.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm.cmd run typecheck -w @jantra/web --if-present && npm.cmd run typecheck -w @jantra/desktop --if-present && npm.cmd run typecheck -w @jantra/client --if-present && npm.cmd run typecheck -w @jantra/embed-widget --if-present
scripts.desktop:dev: npm.cmd run build && npm.cmd run web:build && npm.cmd run build -w @jantra/desktop && npm.cmd run dev -w @jantra/desktop
scripts.desktop:build: npm.cmd run build && npm.cmd run web:build && npm.cmd run build -w @jantra/desktop && npm.cmd run dist -w @jantra/desktop
